title: Mobile Legends Name Symbols: Copy & Paste ꧁꧂ ML Nick Characters
meta_description: Mobile Legends name symbols — rank letters for ᴳᵒᵈ tags, epic kanji, flourish dingbats, and one-click ML nick decorations. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: Superscript rank letters, epic kanji, flourishes, and ready-made MLBB nick decorations. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: Looking for nama ML keren? Mobile Legends nick style has its own signature moves: tiny superscript letters that spell ᴳᵒᵈ or ᴹᴸ before a name, a single kanji like 狼 or 月 for mystery, and the ︻デ═一 sniper tag that every squad has seen in the loading screen. MLBB's name change card accepts these Unicode characters, so they show up in lobbies, rank boards, and squad pages. Copy individual Mobile Legends name symbols below, or take a finished nick decoration and drop your own name in.
